requirement_topic.en: Cell and Battery Pack Safety — ES / IEC 62133

summary.en: The Ethiopian Standards Agency (ESA) develops Ethiopian Standards (ES) and commonly adopts IEC standards by reference, so the relevant cell-safety benchmark for portable lithium cells and packs is ES/IEC 62133 (the Ethiopian adoption of IEC 62133-2 for lithium systems). Where the product falls within a regulated/inspected category, conformity assessment and import inspection administered by CACEA under the Ministry of Trade will look for test evidence against the adopted ES/IEC standard, typically from an accredited laboratory and accepted via the importer. IEC 62133-2 covers abuse testing (overcharge, short-circuit, crush, drop, thermal abuse, forced discharge) and electrochemical performance limits.
summary.zh: 埃塞俄比亚标准局（ESA）制定埃塞俄比亚标准（ES），并常以引用方式采纳IEC标准，因此便携式锂电芯及电池组的电芯安全基准为ES/IEC 62133（即对IEC 62133-2锂系统的埃塞俄比亚转化）。在产品属受监管/受检验类别时，贸易部下属CACEA管理的合格评定与进口检验会要求依所采纳ES/IEC标准的测试证据，通常来自认可实验室并经进口商提交受理。IEC 62133-2涵盖滥用测试（过充、短路、挤压、跌落、热滥用、强制放电）及电化学性能限值。
summary.zht: 衣索比亞標準局（ESA）制定衣索比亞標準（ES），並常以引用方式採納IEC標準，因此便攜式鋰電芯及電池組的電芯安全基準為ES/IEC 62133（即對IEC 62133-2鋰系統的衣索比亞轉化）。在產品屬受監管/受檢驗類別時，貿易部下屬CACEA管理的合格評定與進口檢驗會要求依所採納ES/IEC標準的測試證據，通常來自認可實驗室並經進口商提交受理。IEC 62133-2涵蓋濫用測試（過充、短路、擠壓、跌落、熱濫用、強制放電）及電化學性能限值。

standards_or_laws: ES/IEC 62133 — Ethiopian adoption of IEC 62133-2 (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries) via ESA
CACEA / Ministry of Trade — conformity assessment and import inspection for regulated products

summary.en: China's primary safety standards for portable lithium battery packs are GB 31241-2022 (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment) and GB 18287-2013 (General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones, under revision). GB 31241 is technically derived from IEC 62133-2 but contains national deviations in test severity and acceptance criteria. Because Ethiopia adopts the IEC standard rather than the Chinese national standard, a GB 31241 report does not automatically equal an ES/IEC 62133 conformity result, though much of the underlying test data overlaps and can support an IEC-format report.
summary.zh: 中国便携式锂电池组的主要安全标准为GB 31241-2022（便携式电子设备用密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求）和GB 18287-2013（手机用锂离子电池总规范，修订中）。GB 31241在技术上源自IEC 62133-2，但在测试严苛程度和验收准则方面存在国家偏差。由于埃塞俄比亚采纳的是IEC标准而非中国国家标准，GB 31241报告不自动等同于ES/IEC 62133的合格结论，尽管大量底层测试数据相互重叠，可用于支持IEC格式报告。
summary.zht: 中國便攜式鋰電池組的主要安全標準為GB 31241-2022（便攜式電子設備用密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求）和GB 18287-2013（手機用鋰離子電池總規範，修訂中）。GB 31241在技術上源自IEC 62133-2，但在測試嚴苛程度和驗收準則方面存在國家偏差。由於衣索比亞採納的是IEC標準而非中國國家標準，GB 31241報告不自動等同於ES/IEC 62133的合格結論，儘管大量底層測試數據相互重疊，可用於支持IEC格式報告。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB 18287-2013 — General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones (SAC)

gap.en: Because Ethiopia adopts IEC 62133-2 as ES/IEC 62133, the cleanest evidence is an IEC 62133-2 test report from an accredited laboratory rather than a GB 31241 report alone. Key gaps: (1) GB 31241 national deviations (e.g., crush and overcharge severity) mean a Chinese report may not map one-to-one to the IEC clauses ESA references; (2) conformity is demonstrated to the importer / CACEA inspection rather than via a self-declared CE-style DoC, so the documentation format differs; (3) labelling and language expectations for the Ethiopian market should be confirmed with the importer. Existing GB 31241 data can shorten IEC testing but does not replace it.
gap.zh: 由于埃塞俄比亚以ES/IEC 62133采纳IEC 62133-2，最清晰的证据是由认可实验室出具的IEC 62133-2测试报告，而非仅凭GB 31241报告。主要差距：（1）GB 31241存在国家偏差（如挤压和过充严苛程度），中国报告未必能与ESA引用的IEC条款一一对应；（2）符合性是向进口商/CACEA检验证明，而非通过CE式自我声明DoC，文件格式不同；（3）面向埃塞俄比亚市场的标签及语言要求应与进口商确认。现有GB 31241数据可缩短IEC测试，但不能替代。
gap.zht: 由於衣索比亞以ES/IEC 62133採納IEC 62133-2，最清晰的證據是由認可實驗室出具的IEC 62133-2測試報告，而非僅憑GB 31241報告。主要差距：（1）GB 31241存在國家偏差（如擠壓和過充嚴苛程度），中國報告未必能與ESA引用的IEC條款一一對應；（2）符合性是向進口商/CACEA檢驗證明，而非通過CE式自我聲明DoC，文件格式不同；（3）面向衣索比亞市場的標籤及語言要求應與進口商確認。現有GB 31241數據可縮短IEC測試，但不能替代。

mandatory_status.target: Effectively required where regulated — ES/IEC 62133 cell-safety evidence is the benchmark ESA adopts; CACEA / Ministry of Trade import inspection applies to regulated products before market entry
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241-2022 compliance required under the SAMR framework for portable lithium batteries sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Ethiopia adopts IEC 62133-2 as ES/IEC 62133 through ESA, so an IEC 62133-2 test report from an accredited laboratory is the cleanest cell-safety evidence, accepted through import inspection by CACEA / Ministry of Trade where the product is regulated. China GB 31241 carries national deviations and does not by itself equal an ES/IEC 62133 result, though its data can support an IEC-format report. Exporters should confirm scope with their importer and prepare IEC-format testing.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 埃塞俄比亚通过ESA以ES/IEC 62133采纳IEC 62133-2，因此由认可实验室出具的IEC 62133-2测试报告是最清晰的电芯安全证据，在产品受监管时经CACEA/贸易部进口检验受理。中国GB 31241存在国家偏差，本身不等同于ES/IEC 62133结论，但其数据可支持IEC格式报告。出口商应与进口商确认适用范围并准备IEC格式测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 衣索比亞透過ESA以ES/IEC 62133採納IEC 62133-2，因此由認可實驗室出具的IEC 62133-2測試報告是最清晰的電芯安全證據，在產品受監管時經CACEA/貿易部進口檢驗受理。中國GB 31241存在國家偏差，本身不等同於ES/IEC 62133結論，但其數據可支持IEC格式報告。出口商應與進口商確認適用範圍並準備IEC格式測試。
